title: Expand regression tests to all languages
description: Currently testdata/regressions/ only has JSON test cases. Expand regression test infrastructure to cover all ported languages. For each grammar that has had bugs fixed during development (check git log for 'fix:' commits related to specific grammars), add the triggering input as a regression test with .input and .expected files. At minimum, add regression tests for: JavaScript (template literals, regex/division ambiguity), Python (indentation edge cases), C++ (if scanner issues were found), Bash (heredocs), Java (parse timeout that was fixed in pvl). Update corpus_test.go or create regression_test.go to run TestRegression<Language> for each. Reference: docs/testing-strategy.md Section 4 (Regression Testing).
